prompt: I am a teacher of Intelligent Science and Technology, need to create a syllabus for Data Structures and Algorithms. I don't have the training plan file. Please generate a complete syllabus.

assertions.name: has-meta-table
assertions.assertion: output contains '课程编码' AND output contains '课程名称' AND output contains '学分' AND output contains '总学时'

assertions.name: hours-split
assertions.description: Total hours, lecture, lab, computer, practice as separate rows
assertions.assertion: (output contains '总学时' AND output contains '讲课' AND output contains '实验') AND NOT (output contains '总学时 | 64（讲课48学时') AND NOT (output contains '总学时 | 52（理论44')

assertions.name: six-sections
assertions.assertion: output contains '一、课程' AND output contains '二、课程教学内容' AND output contains '三、建议教材' AND output contains '四、考核形式' AND output contains '五、有关说明' AND output contains '六、课程建设与改革'

assertions.name: section5-substantive
assertions.assertion: output contains '五、有关说明' AND (output contains '先修' OR output contains '衔接' OR output contains '开课学期' OR output contains '修读建议' OR output contains '前置')

assertions.name: section6-substantive
assertions.assertion: output contains '立德树人' AND output contains '教学思想' AND output contains '教学方法' AND output contains '教学手段'
